inputs.label: Start Index
inputs.businessContext: Starting index for the summation in the harmonic series.

businessContext_i18n.en: Starting index for the summation in the harmonic series.
businessContext_i18n.de: Startindex für die Summation in der harmonischen Reihe.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de départ pour la sommation dans la série harmonique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice inicial para la suma en la serie armónica.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice de fin pour la sommation.

inputs.label: Exponent (p)
inputs.businessContext: Exponent for the denominator term; use 1 for the standard harmonic series (1/k^p).

businessContext_i18n.en: Exponent for the denominator term; use 1 for the standard harmonic series (1/k^p).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Payda terimi için üs; standart harmonik seri (1/k^p) için 1 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Exponent für den Nennerterm; verwenden Sie 1 für die Standard-Harmonische-Reihe (1/k^p).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Exposant pour le terme du dénominateur ; utiliser 1 pour la série harmonique standard (1/k^p).
businessContext_i18n.es: Exponente para el término del denominador; use 1 para la serie armónica estándar (1/k^p).

inputs.label: Increment
inputs.businessContext: Step size between successive indices in the summation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Step size between successive indices in the summation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplamada ardışık indeksler arasındaki adım boyutu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Schrittgröße zwischen aufeinanderfolgenden Indizes in der Summation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pas entre les indices successifs dans la sommation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tamaño del paso entre índices sucesivos en la suma.

inputs.label: Shift
inputs.businessContext: Constant added to the index inside the denominator before exponentiation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Constant added to the index inside the denominator before exponentiation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üs alma öncesinde payda içindeki indekse eklenen sabit.
businessContext_i18n.de: Konstante, die vor der Potenzierung zum Index im Nenner addiert wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Constante ajoutée à l'indice dans le dénominateur avant l'exponentiation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Constante añadida al índice dentro del denominador antes de la exponenciación.

inputs.label: Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Scaling factor applied to each term of the series.

businessContext_i18n.en: Scaling factor applied to each term of the series.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Serinin her terimine uygulanan ölçekleme faktörü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Skalierungsfaktor, der auf jeden Term der Reihe angewendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur d'échelle appliqué à chaque terme de la série.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de escala aplicado a cada término de la serie.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
